title: Verasa Pogayile Lyrics Jilla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Verasa pogayila
Singer(s): D. Imman
Lyrics:Parvathy
Movie: Jilla
Music : D Imman

Verasa pogayila ,pudhusa poravale
Idhuvarayila kulir edukkala pennaala.
ava sirichadhum thala orayudhu thannaala
en pechu moochu enga kaanala.. (2)

Idhu naana enna, palasellaam enga
pudhu sandhegangal undagudhu.
indhu thindaatama, illa thallaatama
manna vittu rendu kaal thaavudhu.

Eppodhum naan pogum paadhai idhu
ippodhu nirkkaamal yen neeludhu
enullam lesaaga kaimeerudhu..

Verasa pogayila ,pudhusa poravale
Idhuvarayila kulir edukkala pennaala.
ava sirichadhum thala orayudhu thannaala
en pechu moochu enga kaanala..

Nalla kacheedhama, enna pichi summa
thachi serkuradhu un velayaa.
suthu vattaarathil thandha pattamellaam
ippa noolarundha kathaadiyaa

Nethoda nee vera naan veraya
ippodhu en nenjinmel kooraya
ennulle nee paadhi naan meedhiya..

Verasa pogayila ,pudhusa poravale
Idhuvarayila kulir edukkala pennaala.
ava sirichadhum thala orayudhu thannaala
en pechu moochu enga kaanala..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Verasa Pogayile?

The song conveys themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the excitement of new experiences.

How does Verasa Pogayile fit into the plot of Jilla?

This song highlights moments of happiness and camaraderie among the characters, enhancing the film's overall festive atmosphere.

Who is the singer and music director of Verasa Pogayile?

The song is sung by D Imman, who also composed the music for the film.

When was Verasa Pogayile released?

The song was released on December 17, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Verasa Pogayile, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the joy of living life to the fullest. Set against the backdrop of Jilla, it portrays moments of celebration and happiness among the characters. The catchy melody and engaging lyrics evoke feelings of excitement and positivity. This track serves as a reminder to embrace new experiences and cherish joyful moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Verasa Pogayile from the Jilla movie is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the melodious voice of D Imman. This track perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of new beginnings. With its catchy beats and engaging lyrics, it's a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits!
stanzaMeanings: In this new place, there’s a coolness that I can feel. Her smile is unique, and my words are visible through my eyes.
What is this for me? There are many new doubts arising. In this situation, whether to eat or not, I feel like I’m stuck between two choices.
I always walk this path, but now it feels like my heart is stuck without moving.
In this new place, there’s a coolness that I can feel. Her smile is unique, and my words are visible through my eyes.
It’s a good situation, but I feel crazy about your presence. All the stories that were once told are now just tales from the past.
You and I are different, but right now, you’re speaking to my heart, and I’m half of what you are.
In this new place, there’s a coolness that I can feel. Her smile is unique, and my words are visible through my eyes.
